---
title: "Resources for Research Assistants"
---

Guides and tools for research assistants working in economics.

- [Econ RA India](https://aadityadar.github.io/econ_ra_india/)
  — Resources specifically for research assistants in India.
- [Research Assistant Guide](https://raguide.github.io/)
- [GSLab RA Manual](https://github.com/gslab-econ/ra-manual/wiki/Introduction)
  — Stanford GSLab's manual covering best practices for economics RAs.
- [Poverty Action Guides](https://povertyaction.github.io/guides/)
  — IPA's field guides for research implementation.
- [Julian Reif: Stata Coding Guide](https://julianreif.com/guide/)
